summary: Completed comprehensive testing of PPL Board v3 IPL 2026 prediction app. All backend APIs working perfectly with 5 algorithms, frontend loads correctly with 74 matches, live match functionality operational with all required charts and features.

integration_issues.issue: WebSocket connection warnings in console but functionality works
Chart width/height warnings in console but charts display correctly

passed_tests: Backend API /api/ returns status with scheduleLoaded=true and 74 matches
Backend API /api/schedule returns 74 matches with RCB vs SRH as Match 1
Backend POST /api/matches/{matchId}/fetch-live with betting odds returns all 5 algorithms + confidence_band + bettingEdge
All 5 probability algorithms working: pressure_index, dls_resource, bayesian, monte_carlo, ensemble
WebSocket endpoint /api/ws/{matchId} connects and receives live updates
Frontend homepage loads with 3 tabs (Live/Upcoming/Completed) showing correct counts (0/49/25)
Completed tab shows matches with RCB vs SRH as first match
Upcoming tab shows upcoming matches with dates and venues
Live match page loads correctly with fetch live scores button
Betting odds input fields work before fetching (team1/team2 odds, confidence slider)
After fetch-live: Algorithm Comparison chart shows 5 horizontal bars with different values
Win Probability chart shows multi-line with 5 algorithm lines + legend
Ball log displays correctly with color coding (blue=4s, green=6s, red=wickets)
Scoreboard shows correct CRR (9.4) and RRR (--) with no NaN values
Betting Edge panel displays correctly with positive/negative edges
Right panel tabs (Models/Odds/Squad/Players) all work correctly
Current players section shows batsmen and bowler statistics

success_percentage.backend: 100% (5/5 tests passed - all required APIs working perfectly)
success_percentage.frontend: 98% (all major functionality working, minor console warnings)
success_percentage.integration: 100% (frontend properly consuming backend APIs, all 5 algorithms working, betting edge calculation working)
